objects.name: Tenable security advisory (AV26-387)
objects.description: Serial number: AV26-387 Date: April 23, 2026 On April 23, 2026, Tenable published a security advisory to address a vulnerability in the following products: Nessus Agent – versions prior to 11.1.3 Nessus – versions prior to 10.11.4 and versions prior to 10.12.0 The Cyber Centre encourages users and administrators to review the provided web links and apply the necessary updates.
